user_message_snippet: What is the speed of light?

preprocessing.title: Speed of light explained
preprocessing.chat_summary: User asked about the speed of light.

response: The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 299,792 kilometers per second (km/s), or about 186,282 miles per second (mi/s). This is often denoted by the letter "c" in physics equations. It's a fundamental physical constant that is exactly 299,792,458 meters per second (m/s) by definition since the meter is defined from this constant.
